catalog_content:
Item Name: Frontier Co-op Organic Turmeric Ginger Blend, 1lb Bulk Bag – Warming Tea Blend for Turmeric Ginger Tea, Smoothies, Cooking and Health Remedies, Kosher Bullet Point 1: Premium Quality: We carefully crafted our turmeric ginger blend from the finest organic turmeric and ginger roots, ensuring a high-quality and potent blend for a soothing tea. Bullet Point 2: Versatile Uses: Organic ginger turmeric blend is perfect for creating ginger turmeric herbal tea or to enhance smoothies, soups, stews, and many dishes. It adds rich flavor and boosts health benefits. Bullet Point 3: Rich and Warming Flavor: Enjoy a warming flavor with our turmeric ginger blend. It offers a rich and earthy taste with a gentle ginger kick and a hint of cinnamon, for a perfect ginger turmeric tea. Bullet Point 4: Organic and Kosher Certified: Our blend is certified organic and kosher, with no artificial additives. We ensure it meets the highest standards of quality, offering a pure blend for turmeric ginger tea. Bullet Point 5: About Us: Founded in 1976, Frontier Co-op has grown into a leader in natural, organic and fair trade botanicals. We are member-owned, and committed to purity, honesty and quality. Product Description: Meet the Frontier Turmeric Ginger Herbal Blend Tea, a "rooty" blend of warming turmeric tea that finishes with a little bite from the ginger and smoothing sweetness from cinnamon. Our Turmeric Ginger Herbal Tea comprises high-quality organic turmeric, ginger, cinnamon, and black pepper. This tea will enhance your wellness routine with nourishing properties.

The turmeric ginger tea robust and warming flavor profile combines the earthy richness of turmeric with the gentle spiciness of ginger. A hint of cinnamon adds a smooth, sweet finish, creating a delightful and balanced taste. When brewed, the ginger turmeric tea organic reveals a bright golden yellow color, reflecting the premium quality of the turmeric used.

Enjoy the many health benefits of this tea, which provides a delicious way to boost your turmeric intake. Turmeric tea may help support joint health and overall well-being. Ginger tea supports digestion and can help alleviate nausea, while cinnamon offers antioxidant effects. This combination makes each cup a flavorful and healthful choice.

Beyond its use as a soothing tea, this versatile blend is perfect for adding to smoothies, soups, stews, and various recipes, enhancing both flavor and nutritional value. Use it as a natural remedy for wellness, or incorporate it into your cooking to impart a warm, spicy kick to your dishes. The tea is salt-free, allowing you to enjoy it without concerns about added salts or artificial ingredients.

Tea Preparation: Pour 8 oz. boiling water over 1 tablespoon of tea. Cover and steep for 10-15 minutes, strain and serve immediately.

Features:
Kosher & Organic Certified
Non-Irradiated
Non-ETO
Salt-Free Value: 16.0 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium organic herbal tea blend with high-quality ingredients and multiple certifications. Positioned as a wellness product with versatile uses beyond tea, indicating a mid-to-high price range. Bulk packaging suggests value for quantity, while organic and kosher certifications justify premium pricing.

The Raspberry Ginseng flavor and aroma is wonderful! - Ingredients: Oolong tea, Raspberries (Red), Raspberry Leaf (Red), Ginseng Root and Natural Raspberry Ginseng Flavor. - Hot tea brewing method: Bring freshly drawn cold water to a rolling boil. Place 1 teabag for each desired cup into the teapot. Pour the boiling water into the pot, cover and let steep for 2-4 minutes. Pour into your cup; add milk and natural sweeteners to taste. - Iced tea brewing method: (to make 1 liter/quart): Place 5 teabags into a teapot or heat resistant pitcher. Pour 1 1/4 cups of freshly boiled water over the teabags. Steep for 5 minutes. Quarter fill a serving pitcher with cold water. Pour the tea into the serving pitcher. Add ice and top-up with cold water.
